color_semantics.TEAL: quantum reality (phase rotation, superposition, beating, spectral line)
color_semantics.CRIMSON: classical expectation (particle at rest, static probability, no oscillation)

metadata.note: Card 02 — stationary state phase rotation; single phasor invisible, two phasors beat at Bohr frequency
_variant_todo: rewrite every beat narration_text in the Teardown register (voices/teardown/VOICE.md + CLAUDE-BRAND.md) — voice only, facts unchanged
signature tangent 0-1 per video, ONLY on a clear opportunity (see SKILL)
swap the outro to the Claude outro from AUTHOR.MD :: NikBearBrown
then build audience-namespaced (audio in the new voice, scenes in the new palette)

source_of_truth: beat_sheet.json — edit the sheet, not this file

beats.label: This is Liam, in for Bear. A quantum state called 'stationary' — nothing moves. Or so it seems.

beats.prompt: One energy eigenstate: its probability cloud is frozen. Completely flat. Nothing changes. The phasor spins — but you cannot see it.
beats.label: One energy eigenstate: its probability cloud is frozen. Completely flat. Nothing changes. The phasor

beats.prompt: But atoms emit light at sharp frequencies. If stationary states don't oscillate, where do the spectral lines come from?
beats.label: But atoms emit light at sharp frequencies. If stationary states don't oscillate, where do the spectr

beats.prompt: Classically, a vibrating charge radiates at its oscillation frequency. A static charge radiates nothing. A frozen electron should be silent.
beats.label: Classically, a vibrating charge radiates at its oscillation frequency. A static charge radiates noth

beats.prompt: One eigenstate: |ψ|² is flat in time. The phase rotates at E/ℏ — but |e^{-iEt/ℏ}| = 1. The rotation is invisible. There is nothing to see.
beats.label: One eigenstate: |ψ|² is flat in time. The phase rotates at E/ℏ — but |e^{-iEt/ℏ}| = 1. The rotation

beats.label: Add state 1 and state 2. Each phase rotates at its own rate. Their difference rotates at (E₂ − E₁)/ℏ

beats.prompt: Every spectral line, the same story.
beats.label: Every spectral line, the same story.
